responseMessageContents.text:
## Goal
- Fix the installed Expo React Native IVX Holdings app's real-device failures (diagnostic banner visible in production, `no_supabase_session`, Git SHA `local`, API env `unknown`), then build and ship a new APK with package `com.ivxholdings.app`

## Constraints & Preferences
- ONLY the existing Expo React Native app is approved ŌĆö no separate Kotlin app, no second Expo project, no replacement shell
- Approved Android package: `com.ivxholdings.app` (NOT `com.rork.ivxholdings` ŌĆö that Kotlin app is frozen)
- Use `bun x` not `npx` (npx not allowed in sandbox)
- Never ask user for credentials ŌĆö find them in project or work around blocker
- No secret values in logs, screenshots, reports ŌĆö redact all tokens/keys
- Owner email: `iperez4242@gmail.com`
- API base: `https://api.ivxholding.com`
- APK download links use `litterbox.catbox.moe` with 24h expiry
- EXPO_TOKEN and EXPO_PUBLIC_EAS_PROJECT_ID are NOT set in sandbox ŌĆö EAS cloud build blocked, must build locally
- Diagnostic banner must be hidden by default in production, available only through Owner Control ŌåÆ Diagnostics with Close button and persisted closed state
- Owner AI send button must be disabled until `SIGNED_IN_OWNER` auth state
- Production APK must never show Git SHA `local` or API env `unknown` ŌĆö fail build if identity values missing

## Progress
### Done
- First APK (v1.4.3 build 13) built and uploaded:
  - Watchman disabled by removing execute permission: `chmod -x /usr/local/bin/watchman`
  - Metro bundle pre-built successfully (3850 modules, 24s)
  - Gradle `assembleRelease` succeeded ŌĆö 84MB APK at `expo/android/app/build/outputs/apk/release/app-release.apk`
  - Verified: package `com.ivxholdings.app`, versionCode 13, versionName 1.4.3, API URL `api.ivxholding.com` embedded
  - Uploaded to `https://litter.catbox.moe/kqxpnm.apk` (24h expiry)
  - Copied to `/home/user/rork-app/ivx-holdings-v1.4.3-build13.apk`
- User reported real-device failures from installed build 13 APK: diagnostic banner visible, `no_supabase_session`, Git SHA `local`, API env `unknown`
- Root cause analysis completed:
  - `no_supabase_session`: `OWNER_AUTO_LOGIN_BLOCK` in `lib/auth-context.tsx` was signing out owner on every app launch, preventing session persistence/restore
  - Git SHA `local` / API env `unknown`: `IVXOwnerAIDiagnostics` was reading `apiEnvironment` from `process.env.EXPO_PUBLIC_RORK_API_BASE_URL` (not set), and `build-info.ts` wasn't reading `sourceCommitSha` from `Constants.expoConfig.extra`
  - Diagnostic banner: `<IVXOwnerAIDiagnostics>` was rendered unconditionally at top of chat screen
- Task 1 (diagnostic banner) ŌĆö FIXED:
  - `expo/components/IVXOwnerAIDiagnostics.tsx`: rewrote to accept `visible` and `onClose` props, render only when `visible=true`, added Close button, reads from `getIVXBuildInfo()`
  - `expo/app/ivx/chat.tsx`: added `diagnosticsBannerVisible` state (default hidden in production, visible in dev/Expo Go), AsyncStorage persistence (`ivx_owner_diagnostics_banner_visible`), `handleOpenDiagnosticsBanner`/`handleCloseDiagnosticsBanner` callbacks, Diagnostics button in brand actions for owner to reopen
- Task 2 (owner session) ŌĆö FIXED:
  - `expo/lib/auth-context.tsx`: removed all three `OWNER_AUTO_LOGIN_BLOCK` blocks ŌĆö in `getSession()` path, in stored auth refresh path, and in `onAuthStateChange` handler. Owner sessions now persist and restore normally via Supabase's built-in session persistence
- Task 3 (one Supabase client) ŌĆö AUDITED:
  - Main singleton: `expo/lib/supabase.ts` with `createClient`, `autoRefreshToken: true`, `persistSession: true`, AsyncStorage adapter
  - `expo/lib/ivx-supabase-client.ts`: wraps main client via `getSupabaseClient()`, no separate `createClient` ŌĆö just exports `IVX_CANONICAL_API_BASE_URL`
  - `expo/shared/ivx/access-control.ts`: `createIVXServerClient()` creates ephemeral clients for server-side API route guards only (not used in app)
  - `expo/lib/auth-mfa.ts`: transient `createClient` for MFA challenge verification only
  - No duplicate production client found
- Task 4 (build env identification) ŌĆö FIXED:
  - `expo/constants/build-info.ts`: rewrote to read `sourceCommitSha`, `buildTimestamp`, `buildMarker`, `watchdogPatchVersion` from `Constants.expoConfig.extra`, derive environment from `__DEV__` and `Constants.executionEnvironment`, resolve API base URL from env or canonical fallback, redact Supabase project hint and EAS project ID, added `isIdentified`/`unidentifiedReason`/`assertIVXBuildIdentified()`
  - `expo/lib/ivx-supabase-client.ts`: exported `IVX_CANONICAL_API_BASE_URL` for use by build-info
- Task 6 (session race conditions) ŌĆö FIXED:
  - `expo/app/ivx/chat.tsx`: added `OwnerAIAuthState` type with 6 states (`AUTH_INITIALIZING`, `SIGNED_OUT`, `SESSION_REFRESHING`, `SIGNED_IN_MEMBER`, `SIGNED_IN_OWNER`, `AUTH_ERROR`), `ownerAIAuthReady` flag, updated `sendingDisabled` to include `isAuthBlocked`, updated `composerStatusMessage` to show auth-state messages, added `ownerSignInBanner` UI for non-owner states, added `ownerSignInBanner`/`ownerSignInBannerText` styles
- Task 9 (build config) ŌĆö UPDATED:
  - `expo/app.config.ts`: versionCode 13ŌåÆ14, buildMarkerŌåÆ`IVX_BUNDLE_2026_07_15_BUILD_14_OWNER_SESSION_STABILIZED`, sourceCommitShaŌåÆ`11872578c4c8bd04ae22d90b8593035475117938`, watchdogPatchVersionŌåÆ`ai-mutation-watchdog-fix-v5-owner-auth-race`, frontendDeployMarkerŌåÆ`ivx-frontend-2026-07-15-owner-session-stabilized`
- TypeScript passes (zero errors after all fixes)
- Core test suite: 428 pass, 1 fail, 1 error (Playwright e2e missing `@playwright/test` ŌĆö not app code)
- Attempted `expo/constants/build-info.test.ts` but deleted it ŌĆö importing `expo-constants`/`react-native` in headless Bun test environment crashes (`Unexpected typeof` at react-native/index.js:27)
- `expo prebuild --platform android --clean` succeeded for v14 build
- Gradle build for v14 started ŌĆö versionCode 14 confirmed in `app/build.gradle`, Metro bundling in progress

### In Progress
- Gradle `assembleRelease` for v14 APK ŌĆö running in background, Metro bundling JS bundle (started at ~23% progress)
- Need to verify built APK, upload, and deliver direct download link

### Blocked
- EXPO_TOKEN not set in sandbox ŌĆö EAS cloud build unavailable
- EXPO_PUBLIC_EAS_PROJECT_ID not set ŌĆö defaults to placeholder
- GitHub token expired (HTTP 401) ŌĆö cannot push to `github.com/ibb142/rork-global-real-estate-invest`
- Render only accepts GitHub/GitLab repo URLs ŌĆö Rork git router URL rejected, backend `/version` SHA may remain `0b37191f`
- Real-device testing cannot be done in sandbox ŌĆö user must test installed APK on physical device

## Key Decisions
- Watchman disabled by removing execute permission (`chmod -x /usr/local/bin/watchman`) ŌĆö it hung for 130+ seconds during `createBundleReleaseJsAndAssets`, this was the root cause of all previous build timeouts
- Building APK locally via `expo prebuild` + `gradlew assembleRelease` since EAS cloud is blocked
- Removed `OWNER_AUTO_LOGIN_BLOCK` entirely ŌĆö was the root cause of `no_supabase_session`; Supabase's built-in session persistence now handles owner session restore
- Diagnostic banner uses AsyncStorage to persist closed state across app restarts ŌĆö production defaults to hidden, dev/Expo Go defaults to visible
- Build info sourced from `Constants.expoConfig.extra` (baked into JS bundle at build time) instead of `EXPO_PUBLIC_*` env vars

## Next Steps
1. Wait for Gradle v14 build to complete (Metro bundling + native compile)
2. Verify built APK: package `com.ivxholdings.app`, versionCode 14, Git SHA `11872578`, API env `api.ivxholding.com`
3. Copy APK to `/home/user/rork-app/ivx-holdings-v1.4.3-build14.apk`
4. Upload APK to litterbox for direct download link
5. Deliver final evidence: root cause, files changed, auth flow, test results, Git SHA, APK link
6. User must run real-device test matrix on installed APK (Tasks 7, 8)

## Critical Context
- Git HEAD SHA: `11872578c4c8bd04ae22d90b8593035475117938`
- Previous build 13 APK at `https://litter.catbox.moe/kqxpnm.apk` (24h expiry, may be expired)
- Watchman at `/usr/local/bin/watchman` has execute permission removed ŌĆö all Metro/Gradle builds now work without hanging
- Metro bundler works with Watchman disabled ŌĆö uses polling fallback, bundles 3850 modules in ~24s
- Gradle 8.14.3, JDK 17.0.13, Kotlin 2.0.21, Android SDK 35/36 build-tools available
- `aapt2` at `/home/user/.gradle/caches/8.14.1/transforms/.../aapt2` for APK verification
- Supabase production URL: `https://kvclcdjmjghndxsngfzb.supabase.co` (project ref `kvclcdjmjghndxsngfzb`)
- Owner userId: `9b280e15-f9fd-459f-bf2d-530b1ed84cb1`, role=owner, kycStatus=approved
- Render service: `srv-d7t9ivreo5us73ftose0`, commit `0b37191f`, 77 routes
- `expo/metro.config.js` has `config.watcher.useWatchman = false` and server-only package blocklist
- `rork.json` still points to `android-ivx-holdings` (Kotlin) ŌĆö needs updating to Expo app

## Relevant Files
- `expo/app.config.ts`: Expo config ŌĆö package `com.ivxholdings.app`, versionCode 14, buildMarker `IVX_BUNDLE_2026_07_15_BUILD_14_OWNER_SESSION_STABILIZED`, sourceCommitSha `11872578...`
- `expo/constants/build-info.ts`: Rewritten ŌĆö reads build identity from `Constants.expoConfig.extra`, exports `getIVXBuildInfo()` and `assertIVXBuildIdentified()`
- `expo/components/IVXOwnerAIDiagnostics.tsx`: Rewritten ŌĆö accepts `visible`/`onClose` props, Close button, reads from `getIVXBuildInfo()`
- `expo/app/ivx/chat.tsx`: Modified ŌĆö diagnostic banner visibility state + persistence, auth state machine, send button gating, sign-in banner
- `expo/lib/auth-context.tsx`: Modified ŌĆö removed all 3 `OWNER_AUTO_LOGIN_BLOCK` blocks, owner sessions now persist/restore
- `expo/lib/ivx-supabase-client.ts`: Modified ŌĆö exported `IVX_CANONICAL_API_BASE_URL`
- `expo/lib/supabase.ts`: Main Supabase singleton ŌĆö `createClient` with `autoRefreshToken: true`, `persistSession: true`, AsyncStorage adapter
- `expo/lib/s
